violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. A case of food was stored on the floor in the walk in.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Both handwashing sinks in the kitchen have food particles in them.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items . Fly spray was stored on the same shelf and next to single use items.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The top of the fryers are due for deep cleaning.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
